We Will Heal The Wounds Together! We Hope Everything Will Get Better Soon

06.02.2023

We are deeply grieved by the earthquake was centered in the Pazarcık district of Kahramanmaraş and was felt strongly in Gaziantep, Şanlıurfa, Diyarbakır, Adana, Adıyaman, Malatya, Osmaniye, Hatay, Kilis, and the nearby areas.

We pray for God's mercy on those who lost their lives in the earthquake and quick recovery for those who were injured.

Our sincere hope is that our people who are trapped under the rubble will be rescued safely and the number of losses does not increase with the outstanding efforts of all institutions and rescue teams of our state, especially AFAD, who are working hard in the earthquake area.

We will heal the wounds of this disaster together.

We hope everything will get better soon.

Graphic: Anadolu Agency
